reviews.comment:

Very expensive for non-members. And a mini-shop with little variety. Very tidy facilities.

reviews.comment:
Casi siempre paramos en esta estación cuando vamos por la autovia 2, completo, agradable, lo acompaña un bosque dónde uno puede caminar, tomar mate, comer, autoservicio, baños incluso de discapacidad. Muy bien lugar.

(Translated by Google)
We almost always stop at this station when traveling along Highway 2. It's well-equipped and pleasant. It's surrounded by a forest where you can walk, drink mate, and eat. There's self-service, and even accessible restrooms. A great place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhbGRUUEZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Como siempre los baños impecables.
Los precios son altos a menos que seas socio y tengas descuento.

(Translated by Google)
As always, the bathrooms were spotless.
Prices are high unless you're a member and get a discount.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhNWF1RXh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion y servicios

(Translated by Google)
Very good attention and services
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhcGRQc0RBEAE

reviews.comment:
Ahora con mesas afuera para consumir, es una buena opción de parada en la ruta. Lo malo: a pesar de que tienen tienda Full, por ser ACA, no tiene todas las comidas de cualquier Full ni trabajan con ninguna aplicación, ni siquiera la de YPF. Al menos los socios del ACA siguen beneficiados con los descuentos habituales. Los baños se mantienen limpios y cuidados.

(Translated by Google)
Now with outdoor seating, it's a good option for a roadside stop. The downside: although they have a Full convenience store, being an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) location means it doesn't offer all the food items you'd find at a typical Full station, and they don't work with any apps, not even YPF's. At least ACA members still get their usual discounts. The restrooms are kept clean and well-maintained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhMlp5Y0V3EAE

reviews.comment:
Lo único que hice fue pasar al baño,muy limpio y ordenado. En el lugar de venta de alimentos y bebidas hay mucha variedad de productos y una rápida atención.

(Translated by Google)
All I did was use the restroom, which was very clean and tidy. The food and beverage counter has a wide variety of products and the service is fast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhaWZhUnRBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place to stop and clear your head while refueling with nature's energy.

(Translated by Google)
Very comfortable place with lots of greenery, the bathrooms are spotless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhdnRELUlBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena parada camino a la costa, baños limpios y buena variedad de comida rápida, además de tener un pequeño súper. Hay mesas afuera con separación como para picar algo tranquilo y espacio para dejar el auto.

(Translated by Google)
A good stop on the way to the coast, with clean restrooms and a good variety of fast food, plus a small supermarket. There are tables outside with social distancing for a quiet snack and parking available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhM3JMOHJRRRAB
